name: Doodleybob Ruler oF Realms

sheet.name: Doodleybob Ruler oF Realms
sheet.background_story:
I am Doodleybob.

Ruler of Realms, Conqueror of the Concord, and a Survivor in a project full of sacrifice. I am here today as Doodleybob and one day I will die as Doodleybob but that does not change the way I lived nor does it change the way that I will die. All I know is the way of death is a mere glimpse of the potential you achieved while living. Do not Cower join me and Conquer.

description:
I am Doodleybob.

Ruler of Realms, Conqueror of the Concord, and a Survivor in a project full of sacrifice. I am here today as Doodleybob and one day I will die as Doodleybob but that does not change the way I lived nor does it change the way that I will die. All I know is the way of death is a mere glimpse of the potential you achieved while living. Do not Cower join me and Conquer.
